title: Junior Web Developer
description:
BrightPage Agency builds marketing websites and small web apps for SMB clients. We're hiring a Junior Web Developer to grow alongside our senior team. You'll mostly work in HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and React, with help available from day one.

Responsibilities:
- Build responsive web pages from Figma designs using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
- Implement React components for client web apps.
- Use Tailwind CSS or Bootstrap for styling consistency.
- Connect simple REST APIs from the frontend.
- Use Git and GitHub for daily workflow.
- Test work across browsers and screen sizes.

Must-have skills:
- Comfortable with HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript fundamentals.
- Hands-on with React (components, props, state, hooks).
- Responsive design experience.
- Git and GitHub basics.
- Willingness to learn and accept feedback.

Nice to have:
- Tailwind CSS or Bootstrap experience.
- TypeScript exposure.
- Familiarity with Figma.
- Any portfolio of personal projects.
- Bonus: familiarity with React Router or Axios.
